race.comment: TILL DUSK (1) hasn't done much wrong with a win and three placings from four starts to date and looks the runner in this field with the most upside. Will find this easier than recent efforts in town and rates among the leading prospects. DIVINE DIAMONDS (2) strips fitter third-up from the break and is drawn to get a gun run in transit from the inside marble. Can make her presence felt. SILVER SMASH (10) boasts a win around this circuit and is better than the last couple of efforts suggest. Watch for sharp improvement. DECORATIVE (4) was a touch plain last time out but the form prior was full of merit. Worth another chance. KETTLEBELL (9) next best in a race with only a handful of chances.
